title: Skill
description: Represents a skill within the Perpetual Résumé taxonomy, including metadata, proficiency, and evidence links.

sub_category.description: More specific classification within the category.

description.description: Short explanation of the skill and its context.

usage_notes.description: Optional notes describing how the skill was applied in real roles.

evidence_links.description: List of achievement or bullet IDs that demonstrate this skill.

keyword_variants.description: Synonyms or alternate phrasing used for ATS matching.

relevance_weight.description: Weight used by the tailoring engine to prioritize this skill.

last_used_date.description: Optional date indicating when the skill was last applied.
